steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task dependencies (none declared) and confirm reachable t0014/t0009/t0005 inputs.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure (assets/predictions, assets/answer, etc.).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: t0017 literature survey already covered judge anchoring (Zhou2022) and familial bias (Xiong2024); no new paper review needed for re-judging.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: task uses local data and existing API helpers; no new internet sources needed.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0014 judge code and helpers; identify reusable patterns and the prompt-build/parse logic.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan re-judging pipeline: row pool selection, two judge prompts, sonnet model, scoring, statistics, assets.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: no GPU or remote machines required; uses Anthropic API only.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run substantive critic and model-rotated sonnet judges on the 55-row pool; produce predictions asset and answer asset.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were set up.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: scope is a focused calibration sweep; alternative analyses are already enumerated in the task description's Risks and Fallbacks.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json (multi-variant), costs.json, and charts.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare schema-only and model-only deltas under the new judges to Zhou2022, Boisvert2024, Xiong2024 published bands.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Formulate follow-up task suggestions: scaling decision, judge-prompt iteration, larger-n confirmatory.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task completed.
